tasks.title: Pinia store operatorMode + viewport defaults + ModeToggle + i18n bundles (S3-01, S3-09)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/004-ui-reshape/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/ui-reshape.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-300/301/302) extend web/src/stores/meshsat.js to add operatorMode ref backed by localStorage; default from viewport + URL/UA. Add web/src/components/ModeToggle.vue (header button). Engineer-mode hover tooltip surfaces engineer term. 100% of user-facing strings come from i18n.
tasks.acceptance_test: ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep mode-toggle'

tasks.title: Night/NVIS theme + backlight wire + Engineer keyboard shortcuts (S3-08, S3-10)

SECOND: (REQ-319/320/321) implement NvisThemeToggle.vue with Green A palette + POST /api/system/backlight {value:32} on activate + disable motion globally via CSS class.
